name: jeac-research-skills
description: JEAC research workflows for Taiwan and US equity swing analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Taiwan and US equity research with JEAC risk rules.
interface.longDescription: Evidence-first JEAC workflows for data quality, Minervini SEPA, news, portfolio risk and backtest validation. No trade execution.
defaultPrompt: 用 JEAC 規則分析台股或美股波段型態。
驗證這檔股票的 SEPA、Stage、VCP 與 Pivot。
檢查我的 JEAC 持股風險與停損條件。
